---
title: "TODO"
author: "Chris Kypridemos"
date: "5/25/2020"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# transition
- Methods NOT Added (require Japan-specific adaptations):
- add calibrate_incd_ftlt() - Calibration method that requires Japan-specific disease burden files
- add validate() - Validation method that uses Japan population files and Japan-specific paths
